subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1903
subcodes.first_line: Yes, in the path of the Blessed Beauty one must drink heartily from the overflowing cup of difficulties and afflictions in order to experience its consummate intoxicating effect.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بلی صهبای بلا در سبیل جمال اقدس ابهی باید رنگارنگ باشد تا نشئه کامل ببخشد
subcodes.subjects: @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @humor; jokes, @stories; anecdotes
